text: Here's what science actually says about MHC proteins. These proteins are essential for your immune system, acting like ID cards for cells. But what happens when MHC proteins malfunction? It can lead to autoimmune diseases. Research shows that variations in these proteins can influence how effectively our bodies fight infections. Understanding MHC proteins opens doors to better treatments and vaccines. Curious to learn more about your immune system? Hit that follow button!
